pageContext.name: Maleficent
pageContext.description: I really felt quite distressed at not receiving an invitation.   Thomas Kinkade Studios is pleased to present Disney Maleficent, the story of Sleeping Beauty from Maleficent's point of view after Princess Aurora pricks her finger on an enchanted spinning wheel in the castle tower. Maleficent, with The Raven flying to join her, stands triumphantly on a castle turret overlooking King Stefan and King Hubert who have fallen asleep. Flora, Fauna, and Merryweather have snuck into Maleficent's lair in the Forbidden Mountains to free Prince Philip who races to save Aurora, whose kiss can awaken her from the endless sleep.  This enchanting painting captures Maleficent in both of her personas – as an evil fairy, and when she shapeshifted into a dragon in the Forbidden Mountains. Thomas Kinkade Studios painted this art in the narrative panorama style, sharing many characters and moments from the film in one stunning painting.   Lovers of the timeless classic Sleeping Beauty, be sure to add Maleficent to your Disney art print collection today!
